property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] A Grenadier squad has been deployed. Expect explosions!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Rocket troopers incoming — take cover!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Pistol squad converging on your position!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Shotgun rush incoming — they won't stop!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Sniper nest established. Watch your head!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Magnum guard deploying — heavy fire incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Doomlord minions are closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Knife runners inbound — get them before they reach you!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Demo squad incoming — Grenadiers AND Rockets. Watch the blast radius!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Frontline assault — Shotgun and Knife troops converging!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Overwatch deployed — Snipers and Magnums have the high ground!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DOOMLORD ALERT:[-] Fire team deployed — Pistols and Magnums closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]DOOMLORD HUNT:[-] You've entered Doomlord territory. Survive the gauntlet to face him!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]DOOMLORD SIEGE:[-] Doomlord forces are laying siege! Hold position and eliminate them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 1:[-] Grenadier squad incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 2:[-] Second wave of Grenadiers!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 3:[-] Final Grenadier assault — finish them!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 1:[-] Rocket troopers launching!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 2:[-] More rockets inbound!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 3:[-] Final rocket salvo — take cover!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 1:[-] Pistol squad closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 2:[-] Second Pistol squad incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 3:[-] Final Pistol surge — end this!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 1:[-] Shotgun rush incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 2:[-] Shotgun troopers pressing forward!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 3:[-] Final shotgun charge — hold your ground!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 1:[-] Snipers setting up positions — stay low!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 2:[-] More snipers on the field!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 3:[-] Final sniper volley — flush them out!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 1:[-] Magnum guard advancing!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 2:[-] Magnum troopers pressing the attack!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 3:[-] Final Magnum assault — don't let them through!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 1:[-] Doomlord minions advancing!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 2:[-] More Doomlord minions incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 3:[-] Final wave — eliminate all Doomlord minions!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 1:[-] Knife runners charging — hold your position!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 2:[-] More knife runners closing in fast!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 3:[-] Final knife rush — cut them down!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] Demo squad inbound — Grenadiers and Rockets! Spread out!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] Second demo assault — find cover fast!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 3:[-] Final demo wave — explosive finale!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] Frontline assault — Shotgun and Knife troopers charging!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] Frontline reinforcements pouring in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 3:[-] Final frontline push — hold the line!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] Overwatch unit deployed — Snipers and Magnums on all sides!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] Overwatch tightening the net!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 3:[-] Overwatch final barrage — no cover left!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] Fire team engaging — Pistols and Magnums!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] Fire team presses the engagement!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 3:[-] Fire team final push — break their lines!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]WAVE 1:[-] All Doomlord forces converge — hold your ground!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]WAVE 2:[-] All Doomlord forces — second wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]WAVE 3:[-] Final wave — the full Doomlord army descends!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]THE DOOMLORD ARRIVES:[-] Demolishman himself descends upon you. Finish this!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]THE DOOMLORD ARRIVES:[-] Demolishman leads the siege personally. End him!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]THE LAST ASSAULT:[-] Eight waves of Doomlord forces — then the boss himself. No retreat!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]LAST ASSAULT — WAVE 1:[-] Doomlord Minions — the vanguard begins!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]LAST ASSAULT — WAVE 2:[-] Pistol Squad — quick and relentless!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]LAST ASSAULT — WAVE 3:[-] Knife Runners — they move fast!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]LAST ASSAULT — WAVE 4:[-] Shotgun troopers — stay spread out!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]LAST ASSAULT — WAVE 5:[-] Grenadiers — watch for the explosions!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]LAST ASSAULT — WAVE 6:[-] Snipers — keep your head down!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]LAST ASSAULT — WAVE 7:[-] Magnum Guard — heavy fire incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]LAST ASSAULT — WAVE 8:[-] Rocket Corps — final wave before the boss. Don't get hit!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]THE DOOMLORD ARRIVES:[-] All eight champions have fallen. Now face Demolishman himself — THE LAST ASSAULT!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]ALERT:[-] Dumdum's minions are converging on your position. Get ready!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 1:[-] Dumdum's minions are closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]WAVE 2:[-] A second wave is incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]ALERTE:[-] On parle d'eux en chuchotant. Les Jumeaux Explosifs arrivent. Bonne chance.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]JUMEAUX:[-] Ils arrivent ENSEMBLE. Visez vite.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DEFENSE:[-] Dumdum's minions are swarming this location. Hold the position!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]DEFENSE:[-] Dumdum's army is moving on this position. Survive the waves — then face the boss!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]ALERT:[-] Dumdum's army is mobilizing. Survive the waves — then face the boss!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]BOSS:[-] Dumdum himself arrives. Finish this!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]FINAL WAVE:[-] Dumdum's last minions surround you!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] The Electric Demon's scouts are closing in.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] Stronger infected incoming. Feral and radiated signatures detected.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]FINAL WAVE:[-] Charged and infernal infected are here. The Electric Demon is next.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]ALERT:[-] The Electric Demon has been spotted in the area. Stay grounded.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BOSS:[-] The Electric Demon is here. Expect shock damage and ranged pressure.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]DEFENSE:[-] The Electric Demon is moving on this position. Hold the perimeter.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BOSS:[-] The Electric Demon has breached the zone. Drop it before it overloads the area.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]ALERT:[-] The Demonic Trio is forming. The first Electric Demon is only the beginning.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BOSS:[-] The first Electric Demon has entered the field. Bring it down fast.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]TRIO:[-] Two more Electric Demons have appeared together. Finish them both.

property.name: text
property.value: | [8B0000]EXECUTIONER ALERT:[-] Burning cult minions are closing in on your position!

property.name: text
property.value: | [8B0000]WAVE 1:[-] The first executioner cultists are rushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [8B0000]WAVE 2:[-] More burning servants answer the bell!

property.name: text
property.value: | [8B0000]FINAL WAVE:[-] The cult is overwhelming the battlefield!

property.name: text
property.value: | [8B0000]EXECUTIONER HUNT:[-] Survive the cultist waves, then execute The Executioner.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]BOSS:[-] The Executioner has entered the fight!

property.name: text
property.value: | [8B0000]DEFENSE:[-] Executioner cultists are swarming this location. Hold the line!

property.name: text
property.value: | [8B0000]DEFENSE HUNT:[-] Hold this ground through the waves, then kill The Executioner.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]BOSS:[-] The Executioner is marching on the defense point!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] The first vultures are diving in under the Eagle's shadow.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] More vultures incoming. The air is filling with radiated flyers.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]FINAL WAVE:[-] A full murder of vultures is diving in. The Explosive Eagle is next.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]ALERT:[-] The Explosive Eagle has been spotted overhead. Expect fire and blast damage.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]BOSS:[-] The Explosive Eagle is in the air. Watch for fire, gas, and blast pressure.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]DEFENSE:[-] The Explosive Eagle is moving on this position. Hold the perimeter.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]BOSS:[-] The Explosive Eagle has entered the area. Drop it before it tears the site apart.

property.name: text
property.value: Lanterns sway in the dark. A ghost march is closing in.

property.name: text
property.value: The night stirs. Fast ghost minions are rushing your position.

property.name: text
property.value: You hear stones and screams in the dark. The volley is coming.

property.name: text
property.value: A hollow patrol is roaming nearby. Hold until every ghost falls.

property.name: text
property.value: The carnival lights are dead, but the ghosts still dance.

property.name: text
property.value: Keep watch. The graveyard dead are moving on this position.

property.name: text
property.value: The dead carnival has found this place. Defend it through the night.

property.name: text
property.value: Shrieking stones cut through the dark. Ranged ghosts incoming.

property.name: text
property.value: The dead shift has clocked in. Hold the site until dawn or death.

property.name: text
property.value: Ghost lanterns are breaching the perimeter. Get ready.

property.name: text
property.value: A lost procession is crossing the night. Break it before it surrounds you.

property.name: text
property.value: The vigil is broken. Mixed ghost forces are coming for this place.

property.name: text
property.value: The ground itself is haunted tonight. Clear the waves before they spread.

property.name: text
property.value: A hollow parade is marching on the objective. Do not let it pass.

property.name: text
property.value: Ghost hunt contract active. Survive the escorts and draw The Ghost out.

property.name: text
property.value: Ghost defense contract active. Hold the site until The Ghost breaches it.

property.name: text
property.value: The hunt begins under cover of night. Push through the servants and kill The Ghost.

property.name: text
property.value: Defense: The Ghost contract active. Hold this position until The Ghost arrives.

property.name: text
property.value: The Phantom Court gathers. Survive the royal procession and slay its ruler.

property.name: text
property.value: A haunted siege has begun. Hold this ground until the Ghost is dead.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Spectral lantern bearers are closing in.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: More spectral lanterns advance through the dark.

property.name: text
property.value: Final spectral lantern wave. Put the march down.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Restless ghosts rush the zone.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The rush gets faster.

property.name: text
property.value: Final rush. Cut them down before they break through.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Bowler ghosts and screamers are firing from the dark.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The ghost volley intensifies.

property.name: text
property.value: Final volley. Silence the screamers and stone throwers.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: A hollow patrol enters the area.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: More of the patrol emerges from the gloom.

property.name: text
property.value: Final patrol wave. End the roaming dead.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: The carnival dead spill out of the dark.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The midnight carnival grows louder.

property.name: text
property.value: Final carnival wave. End the performance.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Graveyard watchers are closing in.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The graves will not stay shut.

property.name: text
property.value: Final graveyard wave. Hold the cemetery line.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: The lost procession advances.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The procession deepens.

property.name: text
property.value: Final procession wave. Break the line of the dead.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Haunted ground forces are pushing in.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The haunted ground grows more hostile.

property.name: text
property.value: Final grounds wave. Purge the haunted earth.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: The Ghost sends hunters ahead.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The stalking force tightens the circle.

property.name: text
property.value: Final hunt wave. The Ghost is almost here.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Elite ghost minions are advancing.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The elite escort grows heavier.

property.name: text
property.value: Final elite wave. Brace for the Ghost.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: The Phantom Court sends its first rank.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The court answers with more dead nobles.

property.name: text
property.value: Final court wave. The ruler comes next.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 4: The Phantom Court closes ranks.

property.name: text
property.value: Final court wave. Break the last rank before The Ghost arrives.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Ghost has stepped into the hunt.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Ghost breaches the warded ground.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Ghost answers your challenge.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Ghost leads the night assault in person.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Ghost rules the Phantom Court from the front.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Ghost has joined the haunted siege.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] Hammer Guardian scouts are closing in.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] More Hammer Guardian minions are pushing forward.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]FINAL WAVE:[-] The ground shakes. The Hammer Guardian is next.

property.name: text
property.value: | [C58A3A]ALERT:[-] The Hammer Guardian has been sighted in the area. Prepare for impact.

property.name: text
property.value: | [C58A3A]BOSS:[-] The Hammer Guardian is here. Expect crushing melee and relentless pressure.

property.name: text
property.value: | [C58A3A]DEFENSE:[-] The Hammer Guardian is moving on this position. Hold the perimeter.

property.name: text
property.value: | [C58A3A]BOSS:[-] The Hammer Guardian has breached the zone. Bring it down before it overwhelms the area.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]WAVE 1:[-] Burnt scouts are closing in beneath Hellskyli's flight path.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]WAVE 2:[-] Feral and radiated burnt are pushing through the flames.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF3B00]FINAL WAVE:[-] Charged and infernal burnt are erupting ahead of Hellskyli.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]ALERT:[-] Hellskyli has been sighted nearby. Survive the burnt wave before the demon dives in.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]BOSS:[-] Hellskyli is here. Expect fireballs, dive pressure, and relentless burning damage.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]DEFENSE:[-] Hellskyli is moving on this location. Hold through the burnt assault.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]BOSS:[-] Hellskyli has reached the defense point. Bring the burning demon down now.

property.name: text
property.value: | [4CFF4C]WAVE 1:[-] The first brood of spiders is rushing your position.

property.name: text
property.value: | [65FF65]WAVE 2:[-] Feral and radiated spiders are closing in fast.

property.name: text
property.value: | [A0FFA0]FINAL WAVE:[-] Charged and infernal spiders are swarming ahead of Mykir.

property.name: text
property.value: | [4CFF4C]ALERT:[-] Mykir is nearby. Clear the spider brood before the boss descends on you.

property.name: text
property.value: | [4CFF4C]BOSS:[-] Mykir has entered the hunt. Expect burst speed, fire pressure, and relentless jumps.

property.name: text
property.value: | [4CFF4C]DEFENSE:[-] Mykir's brood is converging on this location. Hold the ground until the boss shows.

property.name: text
property.value: | [4CFF4C]BOSS:[-] Mykir has reached the defense point. Break the brood mother now.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF69B4]WAVE 1:[-] Party Beach is sending in the first wave of businessmen!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF69B4]WAVE 2:[-] Feral businessmen are sprinting into the party zone!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF1493]FINAL WAVE:[-] Radiated and charged businessmen are crashing the beach party!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF69B4]ALERT:[-] Party Beach has been spotted in the area. Survive the suit rush before the boss appears.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF69B4]BOSS:[-] Party Beach is here. Expect purse throws, leap pressure, and close-range chaos.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF69B4]DEFENSE:[-] Party Beach is moving on this location. Hold through the businessman waves.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF69B4]BOSS:[-] Party Beach has reached the defense point. End the party now.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] Rockbreaker sends utility workers to test your line.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] More workers incoming. Feral signatures are mixed in.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 3:[-] Radiated workers are pushing behind the next break-in.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF5500]WAVE 4:[-] Charged workers are entering the pit. Pressure is rising.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]FINAL WAVE:[-] Infernal workers are breaking through. The quarry is about to open.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]ALERT:[-] Rockbreaker has surfaced nearby. Expect heavy impact damage.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BOSS:[-] Rockbreaker is here. Keep moving and avoid the boulder volleys.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]DEFENSE:[-] Rockbreaker is advancing on this position. Fortify and hold.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BOSS:[-] Rockbreaker has reached the objective. Break it before it breaks you.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]ALERT:[-] Two quarry titans are stirring. Survive the worker assault first.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]DOUBLE BREAK:[-] Two Rockbreakers have surfaced together. Bring both down.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] The Kamikaze's scouts are closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] Stronger ones incoming — feral and radiated!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]FINAL WAVE:[-] Charged and Infernal — and then the Kamikaze himself!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]ALERT:[-] The Running Kamikaze has been spotted in the area. Stay sharp!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]BOSS:[-] The Running Kamikaze is here. He runs. He explodes. Don't miss.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]DEFENSE:[-] The Running Kamikaze is moving on this position. Hold the line!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]BOSS:[-] He's breaching the perimeter. Kill him before he reaches you!

property.name: text
property.value: A primal pack is moving through the wilds. Break the Singerie minion waves before they surround you.

property.name: text
property.value: Singerie stones are already flying. Hold this position against the barrage.

property.name: text
property.value: The jungle stirs. Fight through the Singerie escorts and kill their alpha.

property.name: text
property.value: The Singerie are rushing this position. Hold the ground until the beast shows itself.

property.name: text
property.value: An alpha Singerie warband is on the move. Survive the escorts and bring down the boss.

property.name: text
property.value: A full Singerie siege is coming. Hold the objective until the alpha falls.

property.name: text
property.value: Two Singerie alphas are moving together. Survive the full siege before the brothers arrive.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: A Singerie pack is charging in.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: More Singerie minions break from the brush.

property.name: text
property.value: Final pack wave. Finish the troop before it regroups.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Stones and shrieks are raining in.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The Singerie barrage grows heavier.

property.name: text
property.value: Final barrage wave. Hold until the rocks stop falling.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Singerie hunters are moving in.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The Singerie hunting force tightens its circle.

property.name: text
property.value: Final hunt wave. The alpha is close.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: An alpha Singerie warband advances.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The alpha warband grows more savage.

property.name: text
property.value: Final alpha wave. The Singerie boss is entering the field.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 4: The warband redoubles its push.

property.name: text
property.value: Final siege wave. The ground shakes before the alphas arrive.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Singerie has joined the hunt.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Singerie is crashing into the defense.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The alpha Singerie answers your challenge.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Singerie leads the siege in person.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Brothers have entered the field together.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] Burnt zombies are staggering out of the dark toward the siren.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] More burnt infected are locking onto the signal.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]FINAL WAVE:[-] The burnt horde is peaking. Siren Head is next.

property.name: text
property.value: | [B85C38]ALERT:[-] Siren Head has been heard in the wilderness. Reach the zone during the night and hold.

property.name: text
property.value: | [B85C38]BOSS:[-] Siren Head is moving in through the dark. Keep your distance if you can.

property.name: text
property.value: | [B85C38]DEFENSE:[-] Siren Head is converging on this position. The burnt are already coming first.

property.name: text
property.value: | [B85C38]BOSS:[-] Siren Head has breached the zone. Drop it before it corners you.

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]DRUID ALERT:[-] Animal minions are converging on your position!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]WAVE 1:[-] The first pack is charging in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]WAVE 2:[-] Larger beasts are joining the hunt!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]FINAL WAVE:[-] The whole forest is coming for you!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]DRUID HUNT:[-] Survive the animal waves, then face The Druid herself!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]BOSS:[-] The Druid steps into the fight!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]DEFENSE:[-] Druid minions are swarming this location. Hold it!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]DEFENSE HUNT:[-] Hold this ground through the waves and kill The Druid!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]BOSS:[-] The Druid has reached the siege line!

property.name: text
property.value: | [0B6E4F]GAUNTLET:[-] The Druid is unleashing her full menagerie. Ten waves. No breaks.

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET WAVE 1:[-] Feral chickens flood the field!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET WAVE 2:[-] Wolves are circling in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET WAVE 3:[-] The stags are charging!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET WAVE 4:[-] Boars are rushing the zone!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET WAVE 5:[-] Giant explosive chickens inbound!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET WAVE 6:[-] Bears are entering the hunt!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET WAVE 7:[-] The boss boars are here!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET WAVE 8:[-] C4 wolves are sprinting toward you!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET WAVE 9:[-] Zombie bears and dire wolves are closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [2E8B57]GAUNTLET FINAL WAVE:[-] The full menagerie is charging!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]BOSS:[-] The Druid emerges after the gauntlet. End it!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 1:[-] The Mechanician's knife crew is closing in.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FFAA00]WAVE 2:[-] More Mechanician minions are pushing forward with fire and blades.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]FINAL WAVE:[-] The Mechanician's last crew is here. The boss is next.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF7A1A]ALERT:[-] Mechanician minions have been spotted nearby. Expect blades and fire.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF7A1A]ALERT:[-] The Mechanician has been sighted in the area. Survive the crew, then kill the boss.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF7A1A]BOSS:[-] The Mechanician is here. Watch for thrown bikes and explosive pressure.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF7A1A]DEFENSE:[-] Mechanician minions are moving on this position. Hold the perimeter.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF7A1A]DEFENSE:[-] The Mechanician and his crew are moving on this position. Brace for impact.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF7A1A]BOSS:[-] The Mechanician has entered the area. Drop him before the site is torn apart.

property.name: text
property.value: The ground trembles. Witch crouch minions are closing in.

property.name: text
property.value: The chittering grows louder. Witch spider minions are near.

property.name: text
property.value: Prepare the defense. Witch crouch minions are on the way.

property.name: text
property.value: Brace yourself. Witch spider minions are swarming this position.

property.name: text
property.value: The Witch's coven has gathered. Mixed horrors are moving in.

property.name: text
property.value: Dark power stains the ground. The Witch's force is incoming.

property.name: text
property.value: The hunt begins. Fight through the servants and draw out The Witch.

property.name: text
property.value: The ritual has started. Survive the siege and kill The Witch.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1 begins. Witch crouch minions incoming.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2 begins. More Witch crouch minions incoming.

property.name: text
property.value: Final crouch wave. Hold nothing back.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1 begins. Spider minions are rushing in.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2 begins. More spider minions are inbound.

property.name: text
property.value: Final spider wave. Crush them all.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1 begins. The Witch sends a mixed pack.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2 begins. The mixed assault is growing.

property.name: text
property.value: Final mixed wave. End the coven's attack.

property.name: text
property.value: The Witch reveals herself. Kill her now.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4DFF]LEGENDARY:[-] The order is set: Electric Demon, Hellskyli, The Executioner, The Witch, then Mykir.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]PHASE 1:[-] The Electric Demon tears into the field first.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6A00]PHASE 2:[-] Hellskyli descends as the ground is still burning.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4500]PHASE 3:[-] The Executioner marches in to finish what the flames began.

property.name: text
property.value: | [C000FF]PHASE 4:[-] The Witch reveals herself before the final descent.

property.name: text
property.value: | [4CFF4C]FINAL PHASE:[-] Mykir enters last. End the chain or be buried by it.

property.name: text
property.value: The ritual reaches its peak. The Witch has entered the battle.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More minions are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy wave inbound. Clear them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More minions are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy wave inbound. Clear them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More minions are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy wave inbound. Clear them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More minions are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy wave inbound. Clear them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More minions are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy wave inbound. Clear them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More minions are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy wave inbound. Clear them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More minions are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy wave inbound. Clear them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More minions are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy wave inbound. Clear them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy minion wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More minions are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy wave inbound. Clear them all!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]PHASE 1:[-] The Mushroom Boss calls its colony! Minions incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF4400]PHASE 2:[-] The Boss is weakening — its spores surge with desperation!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]PHASE 3:[-] FINAL STAND — The Mushroom Boss unleashes everything!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C850]PATROL:[-] Mushroom scouts have been spotted nearby!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C850]PATROL:[-] Mushroom scouts are incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C850]ASSAULT:[-] A mushroom strike group is moving on your position!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C850]WAVE 1:[-] First assault wave of Mushroom minions!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C850]WAVE 2:[-] Second assault wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C850]ALERT:[-] Mushroom minions are converging on your position. Get ready!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C850]WAVE 1:[-] Mushroom spores are closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C850]WAVE 2:[-] A second wave of spores arrives!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C850]FINAL WAVE:[-] The mushroom colony's last defenders surround you!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00DC50]HUNT:[-] The Mushroom Boss's colony is mobilizing. Survive the waves — then face the Boss!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00DC50]WAVE 1:[-] Mushroom minions guard the boss!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00DC50]WAVE 2:[-] More guardians emerge!

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF0000]BOSS:[-] THE MUSHROOM BOSS arrives! Finish this!

property.name: text
property.value: Blood is already on the ground. A Headless march is closing in.

property.name: text
property.value: A Headless breach has found the site. Hold until the last one drops.

property.name: text
property.value: Mixed ghost and Headless scouts are moving in together.

property.name: text
property.value: A mixed assault is forming. Ghosts and Headless minions are pushing the zone.

property.name: text
property.value: The gory procession has begun. Cut down the Headless before they overrun the line.

property.name: text
property.value: A shattered parade of ghosts and Headless dead is closing in.

property.name: text
property.value: The hunt begins. Break the Headless escorts and drag the boss into the open.

property.name: text
property.value: Headless defense contract active. Hold the ground until the boss crawls in.

property.name: text
property.value: Two Headless bosses are bound to this hunt. Break the escort before both arrive.

property.name: text
property.value: Ghosts and Headless dead answer the same call tonight. Survive the court and kill both rulers.

property.name: text
property.value: Blood, brood and gallows converge. Survive the mixed waves and finish the three bosses together.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: The first Headless rank is dragging itself toward you.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: More Headless bodies stagger into the breach.

property.name: text
property.value: Final march wave. Put the bleeding line down.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Headless intruders are inside the perimeter.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The breach deepens with heavier Headless bodies.

property.name: text
property.value: Final breach wave. Clear the site before it collapses.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Ghosts drift in beside Headless scouts.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: More mixed scouts are circling the lure.

property.name: text
property.value: Final mixed patrol wave. Finish the stragglers.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: The mixed assault hits hard and fast.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: Ghosts screen the Headless charge.

property.name: text
property.value: Final assault wave. Clear the mixed line before it folds on you.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: The Headless procession drags blades and shields into the dark.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The procession thickens with armored corpses.

property.name: text
property.value: Final procession wave. Break the Headless line.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Ghost and Headless lines merge into one procession.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The shattered parade closes ranks.

property.name: text
property.value: Final shattered wave. Cut down the mixed dead.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Elite Headless escorts are advancing.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The escort grows heavier.

property.name: text
property.value: Final elite wave. Brace for the Headless boss.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: The first Headless rank drags itself into the court.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: More Headless bodies pile into the court.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 3: The court refuses to break.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 4: The Headless court closes ranks with heavier dead.

property.name: text
property.value: Final court wave. Break the last rank before the rulers arrive.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Ghosts and Headless dead take the field together.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The mixed court adds more bodies to the line.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 3: The court grows louder and bloodier.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 4: The mixed court closes ranks.

property.name: text
property.value: Final mixed court wave. Break it before both bosses arrive.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1: Headless dead, Executioner minions and Mykir brood converge.

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2: The mixed minion line closes in from every side.

property.name: text
property.value: Final mixed wave. Clear the field before the bosses descend.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Headless answers your lure.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Headless breaches the defense in person.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: Both Headless bosses have entered the hunt.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: The Ghost and the Headless enter the court together.

property.name: text
property.value: BOSS: Mykir, The Executioner and the Headless arrive together.

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] First Headless wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Another Headless wave is closing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [00C8FF]BLUE CONTRACT:[-] Final Headless wave inbound. Finish the job!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Heavy Headless wave incoming!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] More Headless bodies are pushing in!

property.name: text
property.value: | [32CD32]GREEN CONTRACT:[-] Final heavy Headless wave inbound. Clear them all!
